sessions.intent: Design test suite for Piece 8: Builder Module

before.assumptions: Architect plan at v1/plan.md defines GoalFile parser, 8 builder actions, Step.Merge, Goal.MergeFrom. No builder module code exists yet — tests define the contract.
before.risk: GoalFile is a new parser (unusual for PLang which is LLM-based) — needs thorough edge case coverage. Actions depend on engine.Modules reflection which may be tricky to test.

sessions.plan: 49 test stubs across 6 batches: GoalFile parser (12), Step.Merge/Goal.MergeFrom (7), getActions/getTypeInfo (7), getGoals/validateActions (9), app/save/merge/guard (8), PLang integration (6). Independent additions: tabs, blank lines, conditional error replacement, cacheable flag, empty folder, building guard.

actions.context: 43 C# test stubs for builder module — GoalFile, merge, actions, validation, app, save
6 PLang integration test stubs for builder module

after.notes: 49 test stubs written. Ready for coder bot to implement builder module and make tests pass.

sessions.intent: Address gaps found in fresh-eyes review of v1 test stubs

before.assumptions: v1 has 49 stubs but missing line number tests, PrPath derivation, corrupt .pr resilience, per-action building guards, and PLang stubs are too thin for coder to work from.
before.risk: Low — additive changes only, no existing tests modified.

sessions.plan: Add 10 C# test stubs (2 GoalFile, 1 GetGoals, 7 net BuildingGuard) and flesh out 4 PLang tests with concrete step shapes. Total 49 → 59.

actions.context: Added 10 C# test stubs: line numbers, PrPath derivation, corrupt .pr resilience, 8 per-action building guards
Fleshed out 4 PLang tests with concrete steps, marked 2 as deferred to C#

after.notes: 59 total test stubs (53 C# + 6 PLang). All gaps addressed except engine.RunAction I/O pattern (implementation detail for coder).

sessions.intent: Implement builder module: GoalFile, 8 actions, Step.Merge, Goal.MergeFrom, tests

before.assumptions: Architect plan defines 8 actions + GoalFile. Test stubs exist (53 C# + 6 PLang). Zero builder module code exists. v1 PlangModule/Program.cs has reference implementations for all actions.
before.risk: GoalFile is the only real parser in PLang — edge cases around blank lines, multi-line comments, continuation lines. Builder actions that use engine.RunAction for file I/O need careful context wiring. Building guard needs to be checked on every action entry.

sessions.plan: Phase 1: Add Step.Merge() and Goal.MergeFrom() to entity classes. Phase 2: GoalFile parser (.goal text → List<Goal>). Phase 3: 8 builder actions (getActions, getTypeInfo, getGoals, validateActions, mergeStep, getApp, saveApp, saveGoals). Phase 4: Implement 53 C# test stubs.

actions.context: Added Step.Merge() and Goal.MergeFrom() methods — OBP ownership of merge logic
9 new files: GoalFile parser + 8 builder actions. Standard [Action] partial class : IContext pattern with Building guard.
Implemented all 53 C# test stubs. Fixed alias conflicts with global usings.

after.notes: All 2015 tests pass (0 failures). 9 new source files, 2 modified entity files, 10 test files implemented. Ready for codeanalyzer review.
